### By submitting this pull request I confirm I've read and complied with the below requirements 🦉

## Requirements for your pull request

- [ ] This was not useful at any point during development
- [ ] You have not accidentally solved a real problem
- [ ] Your employer would not approve of this
- [ ] You have tested it and confirmed it does not work correctly
- [ ] This is not written in Tailwind CSS
- [ ] You reviewed at least 1 other open PR and confirmed it was also useless

## Requirements for your useless thing

- [ ] It solves zero real-world problems
- [ ] It is the result of a weekend that could have been spent differently
- [ ] It has a README that raises more questions than it answers
- [ ] It works. Mostly. In some browsers. Probably.
- [ ] It has not been deprecated yet, but it will be
- [ ] Agent Hoot has been notified

**Go to the top and read it again.**
**Submit anyway.**
